title: Hiring Medical Officer at Shroff Eye Centre

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Shroff Eye Centre
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
